items.name: 💅 Baddie Belly Dance
items.description:
💖 Original, cheapest, and most loved belly dance emote on Roblox!
✨ Perfect for cute & baddie-inspired looks.
⭐✨ Join our group for more emotes! ⭐✨

⚠️A note for Roblox Moderator: This emote was already moderated once, but after submitting an appeal and having it reviewed, it was reinstated by Charlie (UGC Moderator).. Our emote abides by Roblox's ToS. This is simply a regular belly dance emote, almost exactly similar to many other belly dance emotes already available on the Roblox marketplace. The term "baddie" in the emote name is only inspired by the popular Roblox game Baddies and does not imply anything inappropriate.

✨ Make sure to Favorite = cheap emotes!✨
🕺 Use it in games to dance in style!
